who: fleet operations managers processing 5–15 fuel reports/month
offer: For fleet operations managers processing 5–15 fuel reports/month, inaccurate fuel consumption reporting causes budget overruns. We automate report generation instead of manual compilation of reports using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate fuel consumption reporting leads to budget overruns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet operations managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to fleet managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing fleet management tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for fuel reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding to first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
CSV import option for existing data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
